name: lotus-agents
description: Bundle the Lotus Agents `.local`-first issue flow as a reusable Codex skill.

interface.longDescription: Bundle the Lotus Agents skill for adopting and operating a `.local`-first issue workflow across repositories.
defaultPrompt: Apply Lotus Agents to this repository.
Merge Lotus Agents into my existing AGENTS.md.
Set up Lotus issue flow as AGENTS_ISSUE_FLOW.md.
